title: RevelationaryDimensions
description: A simple addon to Revelationary which adds support for locking dimensions.
body:
# Revelationary Dimensions

A simple addon to [Revelationary](https://modrinth.com/mod/revelationary) which adds support for locking dimensions.

Additionally credits to the [Dimension Stages](https://modrinth.com/mod/dimension-stages) devs for the code I adapted.

### Usage

Simply add a `"dimensions"` field to a Revelationary datapack json.

e.g. in `resources/data/<<mod_id>>/revelations/my_revelation.json`
```json
{
  "advancement": "spectrum:milestones/reveal_quitoxic_reeds",
  "block_states": {
    "minecraft:grass": "minecraft:beacon",
    ...
  },
  "items": {
    "minecraft:nether_star": "minecraft:gunpowder",
    ...
  },
  "dimensions": [
    "minecraft:the_nether",
    "aether:the_aether"
    ...
  ]
}
```
